ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "number_of_items" INTEGER /* Number of items purchased in the transaction */,
  "monthly_income" INTEGER /* Monthly income of the customer */,
  "transaction_time" REAL /* Time of the transaction in minutes since the start of the month */,
  "shopping_record" INTEGER /* Number of shopping records in the transaction */,
  "total_spend" REAL /* Total amount spent in the transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the transaction */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the transaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (Male, Female) */,
  "monthly_income" INTEGER /* Monthly income of the customer */,
  "city_tier" INTEGER /* City tier of the customer (1, 2, 3) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred contact method of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_city_tier FOREIGN KEY ("city_tier") REFERENCES city_tiers ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_tiers" (
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city tier */,
  "tier_name" TEXT /* Name of the city tier (e.g., Tier 1, Tier 2, Tier 3) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city tier */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the city tier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the transaction the item belongs to */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item purchased */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the item */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_items_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the transaction was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., marketing, sales, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
